native_install_mechanism: CLAUDE.md project memory file read at session start
supported_runtime_versions: Claude Code, and Claude surfaces that read CLAUDE.md project memory
install: Commit CLAUDE.md at the repository root. Claude Code loads it automatically as project memory.
uninstall: Delete CLAUDE.md. No global or shell configuration is modified.
rollback: Restore the previous revision of CLAUDE.md from version control.
limitations: Automatic load is established in Claude Code. Surfaces that do not read project memory fall back to Manual activation for that session.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active and supported.
